creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-27 09:20:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/rubygem-dnsruby  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Dnsruby is a pure Ruby DNS client library. It provides a
  complete DNS client implementation, including full DNSSEC
  support.
  
  WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/dnsruby/
  
  PR:             ports/138203
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.109     +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/dns/rubygem-dnsruby/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/dns/rubygem-dnsruby/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/dns/rubygem-dnsruby/pkg-descr (new)
